STATUS CONFERENCE OF APR-12-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CAUSE CALLED, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEARY JR, DAVID IND/DBA COMPLETE AUTO BODY & PAINT POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1 SHARK MEASURING SYSTEM W/SUPPORT PACKAGE,RISER RAMP PACKAGE&RUNWAY SUPPORT BRACKETS, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $20,000.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $13,644.11 DAMAGES, $1,700.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $157.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,501.61, INTEREST $643.28 FOR A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $16144.89. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
